exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: First squat session — conservative 50kg. Hip-width stance, break parallel, chest tall. Brace before descent.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Push hips back, soft knee bend. Feel the hamstring stretch, not the lower back. Per-hand weight.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Pause 1s at full extension. Control the eccentric — don't let the weight swing back.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Curl heel toward glute. Don't let hips rise off the pad. Slow eccentric.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Full range: deep stretch at bottom, full plantarflexion at top. Slow tempo.
